title: Buttery Crunchy Egyptian Fish Falafel
description: A crispy, flavorful, and aromatic twist on traditional falafel, featuring ginger garlic paste and crunchy Egyptian spices, best enjoyed during lunch or dinner. Perfect for pescatarians and adventurous foodies.

ingredients.name: Fish Fillets (any firm white fish such as Tilapia or Cod)

instructions: Rinse the fish fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a blender or food processor, combine chickpeas, ginger garlic paste, lemon juice, olive oil, crushed red pepper, and Egyptian spices. Blend until well combined.
Add the breadcrumbs and blend until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Add the fish fillets and blend until they are well coated with the chickpea mixture.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into 12-15 small patties.
Place the patties in the air fryer basket in a single layer, leaving about 1 inch of space between each patty.
Drizzle the unsalted butter evenly over the patties.
Cook the falafel for 8-10 minutes, flipping them halfway through.
Remove the falafel from the air fryer and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
Serve with your favorite dipping sauce, such as tahini or tzatziki.
